purpose: Safety and fallback rules for RaiWell AI demo.

pm25_scale_thailand.source_basis: Air4Thai / Pollution Control Department scale, summarized by Thai PBS and CMU public resources.

bands.label: ดี
bands.action: Outdoor activities generally acceptable; monitor sensitive users.

bands.label: ปานกลาง
bands.action: Keep outdoor activities moderate; add indoor fallback for sensitive users.

bands.label: เริ่มมีผลกระทบต่อสุขภาพ
bands.action: Avoid intense outdoor exercise. Prefer indoor movement, spa, cafe recovery, or cultural indoor stops.

bands.label: มีผลกระทบต่อสุขภาพมาก
bands.action: Avoid outdoor activities; use indoor recovery plan and advise checking official air-quality sources.

must_include: air quality check before outdoor activity
avoid intense outdoor activity if PM2.5 is elevated

effects.message: RaiWell AI can provide only general wellness planning. Please consult a qualified healthcare professional before changing diet or exercise.
